title: Returns Page: All Fields Required + Video Upload Validation + Admin Video Review

requirements.summary: Make all Returns Page form fields required and prevent submission when any field is empty
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the form with any empty field is prevented and does not call the backend.
All six fields (Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, Video Upload) are marked required.
Inline per-field error messages appear on attempted submission when a field is empty.

Error messages match exactly: 'Order number is required.', 'Customer name is required.', 'Email is required.', 'Reason for return is required.', 'Message is required.', 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.'
Form submission proceeds only when all six fields pass validation.

file_operations.description: Add validation state for all form fields (Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, Video Upload). Implement validation logic that checks all fields before submission and displays inline error messages for empty fields using the exact error text specified. Add 'required' attribute to all input elements and prevent form submission when any field is empty. Add a Customer Name field to the form since it's not currently present.

requirements.summary: Add mandatory video upload section with format validation, file size limit, preview, and progress indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Section heading reads exactly 'Upload Unboxing / Condition Video'.
Section description reads exactly 'To process a return request, please upload a video showing the condition of the product.'
Only MP4, MOV, and WEBM files are accepted; selecting any other format shows a validation error.
Files larger than 50MB are rejected with an appropriate error message.
After selecting a valid video file, a video preview element is displayed.
An upload progress indicator is shown while the video is being prepared/uploaded.
Attempting to submit without a video shows the error: 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.'
No changes are made to existing UI design, colors, layout, or styling.

file_operations.description: Add a new video upload section with the heading 'Upload Unboxing / Condition Video' and description 'To process a return request, please upload a video showing the condition of the product.' Use the blob-storage component's ExternalBlob class to handle video uploads. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing. Implement file type validation accepting only .mp4, .mov, and .webm formats. Add 50MB file size validation. Display a video preview element using HTML5 video tag after successful file selection. Implement upload progress tracking using ExternalBlob.withUploadProgress() and display a progress bar. Show the error 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.' when attempting to submit without a video. Maintain all existing styling and layout.

requirements.summary: Display return requests in Admin Panel with inline video playback and download capability
acceptanceCriteria: The Admin Panel at /admin displays all submitted return requests.
Each return request entry shows: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Message, and the uploaded video.
Videos are playable inline within the admin panel using an HTML video element.
A download button or link is available for each video, allowing the admin to download the video file.
The existing PIN protection for /admin is not modified in any way.
No changes are made to existing UI design, colors, layout, or styling.

file_operations.description: Update the component to display all return request fields including customerName and video. Use the blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() method to render videos inline with HTML5 video elements with controls enabled. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing. Add a download button for each video that uses the ExternalBlob.getBytes() method to download the video file. Display Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Message, and video for each return request. Maintain all existing styling, layout, and PIN protection without modification.

Ensure the useGetReturnRequests hook properly handles the video field of type ExternalBlob returned from the backend. The hook should pass through the ExternalBlob instances without transformation so they can be used with getDirectURL() and getBytes() methods in the admin viewer component.
